texto: It's an extraordinary thing to meet someone who you can bare your soul to. And who will accept you for what you are. I've been waiting, what seems like a very long time, to get beyond what I am. And with Bella, I feel like I can finally begin. So I'd like to propose a toast to my beautiful bride. No measure of time with you will be long enough. But let's start with forever.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Breaking Dawn Part 1 Film: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “It's an extraordinary thing to meet someone who you can bare your soul to. And who will accept yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, breaking-dawn-part-1, speech pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e speech.

frase_original: It's an extraordinary thing to meet someone who you can bare your soul to. And who will accept you for what you are. I've been waiting, what seems like a very long time, to get beyond what I am. And with Bella, I feel like I can finally begin. So I'd like to propose a toast to my beautiful bride.
